name: My employer sent me to a doctor 3 hours away—is that allowed?
description: No. Treatment must be reasonably convenient. Request a local provider. If refused, a lawyer can enforce your right to accessible care.

mainEntity.name: My employer sent me to a doctor 3 hours away—is that allowed?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. Treatment must be reasonably convenient. Request a local provider. If refused, a lawyer can enforce your right to accessible care.
